methods.description: This method involves the preparation and analysis of rock samples using optical microscopy and scanning electron microscopy (SEM) to perform petrographic and textural characterization.

steps.description: Rock samples were cut with an oil-refrigerated 1 mm thick diamond disc saw (Struers Discoplan-TS).
steps.searchable_summary: Cut rock samples using a diamond disc saw

steps.description: A low viscosity oil was used (rhenus GP 5M) for cutting, grinding and polishing.
steps.searchable_summary: Use low viscosity oil for cutting, grinding, and polishing

steps.description: Grinding to the final thickness has been done using emery papers with different grit sizes, impregnated with oil.
steps.searchable_summary: Grind samples to final thickness using emery papers

steps.description: Unconsolidated samples were previously indurated with a resin under vacuum (Struers Epofix resin).
steps.searchable_summary: Indurate unconsolidated samples with resin under vacuum

steps.description: The thin sections were glued on 4.8 cm × 2.8 cm glass slides using LOCTITE 358, and cured afterwards under ultraviolet light.
steps.searchable_summary: Glue thin sections on glass slides and cure under UV light

steps.description: Petrographic characterization was performed using a Zeiss West Germany Optical 316 Microscope (OM) at the Department of Petrology and Geochemistry of Complutense University of Madrid (UCM).
steps.searchable_summary: Perform petrographic characterization using optical microscope

steps.description: Textural characterization of the samples was completed by scanning electron microscopy observations performed using a JEOL 6.400 instrument working at 20 kV 320 microscopy (SEM), at the CAI Geological Techniques Laboratory (UCM).

methods.description: This method involves the analysis of primary fluid inclusions within mineral crystals to determine their chemical composition using Cryo-SEM.

steps.description: In this study, only primary fluid inclusions have been analyzed, established as primary by their relationship with the crystals' growth zonation.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify and select primary fluid inclusions for analysis

steps.description: The primary fluid inclusion chemical composition has been analyzed by Cryo-SEM.
steps.searchable_summary: Analyze chemical composition of fluid inclusions using Cryo-SEM
